top_signals.title: AMP Trims ‘Frothy’ Private Credit Assets in Investment Pivot
top_signals.summary: Australian pension and wealth manager AMP Ltd. has been scaling back its exposure to private credit, citing an increasingly frothy market as its shifts money toward assets such as infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
